# InfinityKit - 100% Client-Side Web Utilities Suite

InfinityKit is a premium suite of secure, high-performance web applications and digital utilities executed completely client-side in the browser. By leveraging local browser calculations, InfinityKit guarantees absolute user privacy, zero data uploads, and complete serverless security.

## Core Features & Philosophy
- **100% Client-Side Privacy:** All files, PDF operations, images, audio, video, calculations, and conversions are computed in-memory in the browser. Zero user data is uploaded to external servers.
- **Microsecond Speeds:** High-performance, lightweight browser-based algorithms render calculations instantly.
- **Zero Tracker Intrusion:** Open-access ecosystem with absolute zero telemetry, cookie payloads, or analytical monitoring.
- **Premium Apple + Linear UI:** Beautiful White-Theme glassmorphic cards, diagonal ambient glows, and responsive typography optimized for all desktop and mobile displays.

---

## Tool Categories & Route Catalog

### 🛠️ Utility & Health Tools
- **BMI Calculator:** `/tools/bmicalculator` - Instant weight-to-height screening assessments.
- **Drug Dosage Calculator:** `/tools/drugdosage` - Pediatric & clinical mg/ml dosage estimations.
- **IV Drip Rate Calculator:** `/tools/ivdripcalc` - Calculate drops/minute (gtt) for medical infusions.
- **Password Generator:** `/tools/passwordgen` - Generate cryptographically secure passwords locally.
- **Medicine Reminder:** `/tools/medicinereminder` - Secure alarm system for medicine tracking.
- **To-Do List:** `/tools/todolist` - Task list and micro-schedules with local storage syncing.
- **Notes Manager:** `/tools/notes` - Quick text pads and markdown logs stored locally.
- **Timer & Stopwatch:** `/tools/timer` - Precision timers and split chronometers.

### ✍️ AI-Powered Writing Utilities
*Driven by Gemini Flash client-side APIs with custom parameter adjustments.*
- **AI Chatbot Console:** `/tools/chatbot` - Client-side AI conversation partner.
- **AI Text Improver:** `/tools/text-improver` - Refine flow, grammar, and voice of draft pages.
- **AI Document Summarizer:** `/tools/summarizer` - Condense large articles and papers into bullet points.
- **AI Image Generator:** `/tools/image-generator` - Text-to-image prompts rendered locally.
- **AI Essay Writer:** `/tools/essay-writer` - Draft research essays, outlines, and thesis statements.
- **AI Article Writer:** `/tools/article-writer` - Construct long-form blog content and articles.
- **AI FAQ Generator:** `/tools/faq-generator` - Compile structural SEO FAQs from target text.
- **AI Rewriter:** `/tools/ai-rewriter` - Rephrase text drafts for alternative formats.
- **AI Humanizer:** `/tools/ai-humanizer` - Adjust AI-written articles for standard human readability.
- **AI Grammar Fixer:** `/tools/grammar-fixer` - Instant spell check and text correction.

### 📊 Expense & Financial Hub
- **Add Expense:** `/tools/expenseadd` - Record daily expenditures under custom labels.
- **Expense History List:** `/tools/expenselist` - View and search chronological transactions.
- **Budget Tracker:** `/tools/budgettracker` - Allocate monthly limits and check safety thresholds.
- **Expense Analytics Charts:** `/tools/expenseanalytics` - Radial graphs displaying spending breakdowns.
- **Daily/Monthly Report Builder:** `/tools/dailymonthlyreport` - Compile structured cashflow balance statements.
- **Top Spending Insights:** `/tools/topspendinginsights` - Check major category leaks.
- **Search Expenses Engine:** `/tools/searchexpenses` - Filter transactions by name, label, or price.
- **Reset Financial Session:** `/tools/resetexpenses` - Purge local records for safety.

---

## Technical Specifications
- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router React v18)
- **Deployment Endpoint:** Standard NextJS build compiled to statically optimized client page pathways
- **Asset Base Url:** `https://infinitykit.online`
- **Sitemap Location:** `https://infinitykit.online/sitemap.xml`
- **Robots Rules:** Direct crawl permission granted to all bots (`*`, `GPTBot`, `ClaudeBot`, `Google-Extended`, `PerplexityBot`)
